body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/travel/orders/budget-release 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/travel/orders/budget-release 
 ## 接口描述 
月结订单预算释放接口，释放成功返回释放成功的第三方订单号列表 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platform","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0","exampleValue":"FEIHEAIR","desc":"%20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"thirdOrderId","required":true,"label":"%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"BUDGET-002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderUniqueId","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","exampleValue":"2025212002","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%8A%E6%94%BE%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%8A%E6%94%BE%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"null","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%87%8A%E6%94%BE%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"orderUniqueId","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%8A%E6%94%BE%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","exampleValue":"2025212002","desc":""}}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
[
    {
        "platform":"FEIHEAIR",
        "thirdOrderId":"BUDGET-002",
        "orderUniqueId":"2025212002"
    }
]
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "message": null,
    "data": [
        {
            "orderUniqueId": "2025212002"
        }
    ]
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- | 
  | 200 | 成功 |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/travel/orders/budget-release

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/travel/orders/budget-release

接口描述

月结订单预算释放接口，释放成功返回释放成功的第三方订单号列表

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platform","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0","exampleValue":"FEIHEAIR","desc":"%20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"thirdOrderId","required":true,"label":"%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"BUDGET-002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderUniqueId","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","exampleValue":"2025212002","desc":""}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%8A%E6%94%BE%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%8A%E6%94%BE%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"null","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%87%8A%E6%94%BE%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"orderUniqueId","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%8A%E6%94%BE%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","exampleValue":"2025212002","desc":""}}]}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

[
    {
        "platform":"FEIHEAIR",
        "thirdOrderId":"BUDGET-002",
        "orderUniqueId":"2025212002"
    }
]

响应报文

{
    "success": true,
    "message": null,
    "data": [
        {
            "orderUniqueId": "2025212002"
        }
    ]
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
200 成功
